title: SUCCESS: Research-backed HF papers context was integrated by adding r
content: Approach: Research-backed HF papers context was integrated by adding research-only ContextFS templates plus metadata capture in autoresearch/GTM flows, while keeping verification semantics unchanged. Successful pattern: verify in a dedicated clean worktree with npm ci, full standard suite, proof artifacts in the temp worktree, then byte-compare changed source files back to the primary checkout and remove stray local proof artifacts.
